text:
Likke ( リァッケ, Riakke) is a Hunter and an acquaintance of Morel Mackernasey. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 22, Chapter 234 

Background

During the course of their life, Likke became a Hunter and befriended Morel. At some point, Likke also learned Nen. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

After Knuckle and Morel fail to capture Cheetu, Morel contacts the Hunter Association requesting they deploy Likke to deal with the Chimera Ant. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 221 However, the review board refuses, sending someone else, probably a Temp Hunter, who fails in the task, much to Morel’s anger and whom blames the Vice Chairman for the incident. 

Abilities & Powers

Likke has all the benefits granted by their status as a Hunter. Likke is likely very strong, since Cheetu, their intended target, managed to put up a good fight against Knuckle and Morel. It is heavily implied that Likke specializes in fighting extremely fast opponents. 

Nen

As a Pro-Hunter, Likke is capable of using Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 7, Chapter 60
